channel.title: xargs on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in xargs on IT notes

item.title: parallel xargs
item.description: To run a script in parallel using xargs: printf %d\\n {0..9} | xargs -n 1 -P8 sleep In this case sleep is going to be call 8 times (-P8) using has the input an int from 0 to 9. From the man: -P maxprocs Parallel mode: run at most maxprocs invocations of utility at once.
